name: Tossed Snow Peas & Zucchini
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Fresh Snow Peas, cut into 1 inch diagonal pieces
1 t Safflower Vegetable Oil or 1 t Olive Oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the peas in a vegetable steamer over hot water. Cover and steam for 2 minutes, or until crisp tender. Drain and rinse under cold water.
2. Combine the peas, zucchini, tomatoes, and pine nuts in a medium bowl.
3. In a small bowl, mix together the minced shallot, red wine vinegar, safflower vegetable oil (or olive oil), and freshly ground pepper.
4. Pour the dressing over the vegetables and toss gently to combine.
5. Cover and chill thoroughly.
